---
title: "Cluster Report"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')`"
output:
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: true
    fig_width: 7
    fig_height: 4.5
    latex_engine: xelatex
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: flatly
    fig_width: 8
    fig_height: 5
params:
  report_data: NULL
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.align = "center",
  out.width = "95%"
)
rd <- params$report_data
is_pdf <- knitr::is_latex_output()

# Pre-split parcels for O(1) lookup per cluster
cp_split <- if (!is.null(rd$cluster_parcels) && nrow(rd$cluster_parcels) > 0) {
  split(rd$cluster_parcels, rd$cluster_parcels$cluster_id)
} else {
  list()
}
```

# Summary

**Threshold**: `r rd$params$threshold` | **Tail**: `r rd$params$tail` | **Min cluster size**: `r rd$params$min_cluster_size`

**Clusters found**: `r nrow(rd$cluster_table)` | **Atlas**: `r rd$params$atlas_name`

```{r report-mode-note, results='asis'}
if (identical(rd$params$report_mode, "table_only")) {
  cat("*Sample-level signal plots are omitted because no backing data source was supplied.*\n")
}
```

## MNI Coordinate Table

```{r mni-table, results='asis'}
if (!is.null(rd$mni_table)) {
  print(rd$mni_table)
} else {
  cat("*No clusters survived thresholding.*\n")
}
```

`r if (is_pdf) "\\newpage"`

# Cluster Details

```{r cluster-sections, results='asis', fig.width=7, fig.height=4.5}
ct <- rd$cluster_table
if (nrow(ct) == 0) {
  cat("*No clusters to display.*\n")
} else {
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(ct))) {
    cid <- ct$cluster_id[i]
    row <- ct[i, , drop = FALSE]
    label <- neuromosaic::cluster_display_label(row)

    cat("\n\n## ", label, "\n\n", sep = "")
    cat("- **Peak MNI**: (",
        ct$peak_mni_x[i], ", ", ct$peak_mni_y[i], ", ", ct$peak_mni_z[i],
        ")\n", sep = "")
    cat("- **Peak stat**: ", round(ct$max_stat[i], 2), "\n", sep = "")
    cat("- **Voxels**: ", ct$n_voxels[i], "\n", sep = "")
    if (!is.na(ct$network[i])) {
      cat("- **Network**: ", ct$network[i], "\n", sep = "")
    }

    # Parcel overlap sub-table
    cp <- cp_split[[cid]]
    if (!is.null(cp) && nrow(cp) > 0) {
      cp_display <- data.frame(
        Parcel = cp$parcel_label,
        Voxels = cp$n_voxels,
        `Overlap %` = round(cp$frac * 100, 1),
        check.names = FALSE
      )
      cat("\n### Parcel Overlaps\n\n")
      print(knitr::kable(cp_display, format = "pipe"))
      cat("\n")
    }

    # Brain slice images
    if (!is.null(rd$brain_slices) && cid %in% names(rd$brain_slices) &&
        !is.null(rd$brain_slices[[cid]])) {
      cat("\n### Brain View\n\n")
      slice_set <- rd$brain_slices[[cid]]
      if (is.list(slice_set)) {
        for (view_name in names(slice_set)) {
          cat("\n#### ", tools::toTitleCase(view_name), "\n\n", sep = "")
          print(slice_set[[view_name]])
          cat("\n")
        }
      } else {
        print(slice_set)
        cat("\n")
      }
    }

    # Time-course plots
    if (!is.null(rd$plots) && length(rd$plots) > 0) {
      for (fname in names(rd$plots)) {
        formula_plots <- rd$plots[[fname]]
        if (cid %in% names(formula_plots)) {
          cat("\n### ", fname, "\n\n", sep = "")
          print(formula_plots[[cid]])
          cat("\n")
        }
      }
    }

    if (is_pdf) cat("\n\\newpage\n")
  }
}
```

# Session Info

```{r session-info}
sessionInfo()
```
